headline: PG&E (PCG) Price Target Raised by Morgan Stanley and Barclays
summary: PG&E Corporation (NYSE:PCG) is one of the 10 Best Stocks Under $20 to Buy According to Hedge Funds. On February 20, Morgan Stanley raised its price target on PG&E Corporation (NYSE:PCG) from $21 to $23 and maintained its Equal Weight rating on the stock. This update comes as the research firm updates its price targets […]
